para1: DJ Grin is a Lagos-based open-format DJ who reads a room and plays exactly what it needs — Afrobeats and Amapiano for the dance floor, Highlife and old-school for the parents' table, Hip-Hop and RnB for the after-party, and the right transitions to hold it all together.
para2: From traditional engagements to white-wedding receptions, rooftop club nights to corporate end-of-year parties, Grin has built a reputation on one thing: the floor never empties.
